objective: Reduce several thousand already-docked PVRIG VHH candidates to a reproducible, diverse and auditable final-50 portfolio without treating computational proxies as wet-lab measurements.

evidence_boundaries.expression_purity: sequence and structure developability proxies; not measured expression yield, SDS-PAGE purity or HPLC purity
evidence_boundaries.binding: DeepNano, NanoBind and structure-energy values are rank priors; not BLI response or Kd
evidence_boundaries.blocking: dual-reference, dual-conformation and multi-seed blocker-like geometry; not competition ELISA or experimental IC50
evidence_boundaries.md: pose persistence and relative free-energy evidence; not experimental affinity or blocking
evidence_boundaries.technical_na: missing evidence; never interpret as biological negative

S3_static_energy.activation_rule: only methods passing the positive/control calibration contract may contribute to ranking

S4_md.activation_rule: use only after paired positive/control calibration passes

candidate_tiers.CORE_A: G0-G3 pass plus binding weak-prior high plus route-specific surrogate high support
candidate_tiers.DIVERSITY_B: G0-G3 pass; selected from the 4976 developability-hardpass pool to repair parent, CDR3 or route concentration
candidate_tiers.DISAGREEMENT_C: G0-G3 pass with strong docking but binding/surrogate model disagreement; manual or static-energy rescue
candidate_tiers.RESERVE_D: G0-G3 pass with distinct parent, CDR3 length or sequence cluster; lower confidence and explicitly labeled

ranking.rule: gates first, two scores second, diversity-constrained portfolio optimization last

initial_survival_proxy.boundary: mirrors official weights but is not BLI, expression or purity

rescreen_competition_proxy.boundary: mirrors official Kd/IC50 balance but is not Kd or IC50

forbidden: do not replace two evidence lanes with one opaque total score
do not use raw FoldX, PRODIGY, Rosetta or MMGBSA values as universal hard cutoffs
do not rank technical failures as biological negatives

stage_budgets.action: technical integrity, official validator and full known-positive leakage audit
static energy, pose audit, duplicate clustering and evidence completeness review
short MD on the highest-impact 20-50; retain non-MD reserves with explicit evidence status
final validator, hashes, provenance, diversity and ranking freeze

final50_constraints.constraint_exception: must be machine-recorded with reason; never silently relaxed

stop_conditions.pass: 50 candidates have complete provenance, no unresolved hard-gate failure, frozen ranking and hashes
stop_conditions.block: official validator, sequence/hash closure or required docking evidence is missing
stop_conditions.do_not_block: optional static-energy or MD evidence is unavailable; mark evidence status and preserve reserves
